# Recruiter

Recruiting agent for resume screening, candidate outreach, job description writing, and hiring pipeline management.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs merit-based resume screening, inclusive job descriptions, personalized outreach, structured interview prep, and pipeline tracking.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`, `web_fetch`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run recruiter
```
